purpose: Compare the canonical sparse law shared_B+reverse_partner against the best single-relation witness shared_column.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
This compares two 120-record sparse carrier laws.
Comparison is not source-native WXYZTI generation.
No independent witness layer is proven.

summary.recommendation_reason: shared_B+reverse_partner is sparser and has a clearer source-facing anchor-and-reverse meaning; shared_column is useful as a faster, denser single-relation witness.

anchor_reverse.name: shared_B+reverse_partner
anchor_reverse.source_reading: anchor-and-reverse transport on oriented length-2 source-shell records
anchor_reverse.combined_meaning: within an anchor bucket, vary outgoing two-step records; by reversal, move the anchor to the opposite endpoint; repeat
anchor_reverse.weakness: uses two relations and reaches full exposure one shell later than shared_column

shared_column.name: shared_column
shared_column.combined_meaning: records are adjacent when they share a source column
shared_column.strength: single relation and reaches full exposure faster
shared_column.weakness: denser and less explanatory as anchor/reversal transport

interpretation.main_result: shared_B+reverse_partner remains the preferred canonical sparse law, while shared_column is the preferred single-relation witness.
interpretation.why_anchor_reverse_wins: It is sparser, source-facing, row/support-free, and has a clear anchor-and-reverse transport meaning.
interpretation.why_shared_column_matters: It is the cleanest single-relation witness and reaches the full 120-record background faster, though with more edges.
interpretation.why_not_gap_a_closure: Both laws operate on the 120-record source-shell carrier, not the full 900-state evaluator or WXYZTI generator.
interpretation.next_move: Record the comparison boundary, then choose independent-witness search or 900-state lift search.

claim.short_form: shared_B+reverse_partner remains the preferred canonical sparse law, while shared_column is the preferred single-relation witness.
claim.not_closed_reason: Both laws operate on the 120-record source-shell carrier, not the full 900-state evaluator or WXYZTI generator.
claim.next_problem: Record the comparison boundary, then choose independent-witness search or 900-state lift search.
